name: Italian Filling for Yeast Pasty Dough
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Spinach, cooked, squeezed-dry and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove sausage from casings and crumble into a skillet. Saute over medium-high heat until browned. Drain well and transfer to a mixing bowl.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet and saute pine nuts until golden. Add garlic and cook briefly.
3. Add the sauteed pine nuts, garlic, sausage, spinach (dried and chopped), ricotta cheese, and beaten egg to the mixing bowl. Mix well.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Roll out dough and cut into 4-inch squares.
6. Place 2 tablespoons of filling in the center of each square of dough. Fold over and seal with the tines of a fork.
7. Place on lightly greased baking sheet. Let stand in a warm place for 15 minutes.
8. Brush with egg wash.
9. Bake in a 425°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes. Cool on wire racks.
10. Makes about 24 pastries.
From the San Francisco Chronicle, August 10, 1988. Posted by Stephen Ceideberg on November 11, 1992.
